title: Semester-End Examination Preparation Flowchart
description: A visual guide outlining the key steps and concepts to prepare for the Theory of Computation final exam, based on Module 5 content.
elements: Practice Undecidable Problem Proofs (e.g., Halting Problem)
Analyze Time/Space Complexity Classes (P, NP, NP-Complete)
relationships: Sequential flow from foundational review to advanced problem-solving, culminating in practical exam simulation
